commands.review_summary:
The branch adds signed marketplace feed envelope/config/refresh/snapshot support and surfaces verified trust state in marketplace refresh/entries JSON, text output, and diagnostics.

PR surface: Source +508, Tests +747, Generated +10. Total +1265 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows duplicate normalized public keys can pass config validation and the verifier counts distinct keyIds, not distinct key material. The changed CLI behavior itself only has mock-based test proof in the PR body.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual maintainer/security review is needed because this draft has a protected maintainer label, open stacked predecessors, mock-only proof, and a security-boundary threshold finding.

target.title: Show marketplace feed trust state
target.body:
## Summary

- show verified hosted feed trust state in `plugins marketplace refresh --json` and `plugins marketplace entries --json`
- print a bounded `Trust:` line in text output for hosted live and hosted snapshot results
- add bounded diagnostics attributes for signed feed verification without emitting signing key ids, raw URLs, checksums, or signing material

## Stack notes

Hosted feed trust series PR #5 / OpenClaw PR #4. This is stacked after:

- #98299 `feeds-trust-envelope-verifier`
- #98316 `feeds-trust-source-profiles`
- #98338 `feeds-trust-refresh-state`

This draft targets `main` because the dependency branches are on the fork. Please review the top commit `b17fe34c18` until the earlier stack lands.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
Signed hosted marketplace refresh state was verified and persisted by the previous slice, but operators could not see the bounded trust state from the marketplace CLI JSON/text output, and diagnostics needed to expose only low-cardinality verification facts.

Real environment tested:
Windows checkout at `C:\src\openclaw-feeds-trust-cli-visibility`, source-level CLI runtime tests with mocked marketplace loader results for verified live hosted and verified hosted-snapshot responses.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-refresh.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-entries.test.ts`
2. `pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings src/cli/plugins-cli.runtime.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-refresh.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-entries.test.ts`
3. `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/cli/plugins-cli.runtime.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-refresh.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-entries.test.ts`
4. `pnpm tsgo:core`
5. `git diff --check`
6. `codex review --base fork/feeds-trust-refresh-state`

Evidence after fix:
Focused Vitest output:

```text
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  12 passed (12)
```

Codex review output:

```text
No actionable correctness issues were found in the changed marketplace CLI trust-state output/telemetry handling.
```

Observed result after fix:
`plugins marketplace refresh` and `plugins marketplace entries` now include a bounded signed-feed trust object in JSON and print `Trust: signed by <key-id> (<signature-count>/<threshold>) verified <timestamp>` in text output. Diagnostics emit `feedTrustVerified`, `feedTrustMode`, `feedTrustSignatureCount`, and `feedTrustThreshold`, and tests assert diagnostics do not include the signing key id, raw feed host, feed id, checksum, URL credentials, token query string, or override token.

What was not tested:
No live ClawHub signed feed was available for this CLI-only slice. The previous stack slice covers signed refresh verification and signed snapshot re-verification; this PR covers the CLI/runtime rendering contract for that already-verified trust object.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-refresh.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-entries.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings src/cli/plugins-cli.runtime.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-refresh.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-entries.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/cli/plugins-cli.runtime.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-refresh.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.marketplace-entries.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --base fork/feeds-trust-refresh-state`
